cleanupx.description: cleanupx is a comprehensive file organization and processing framework with AI-powered capabilities. It provides intelligent file deduplication, image processing with accessibility features, privacy utilities like filename scrambling, and seamless integration with AI services for content analysis.  Key features: - AI-powered file analysis and deduplication - Image accessibility features (alt text generation) - Privacy utilities (filename scrambling) - Comprehensive file organization - Rich CLI interface with progress bars - Extensible plugin architecture
cleanupx.summary: Comprehensive AI-powered file processing and organization tool
